pages.text: The $(item)Aquarium Skyseed$() — a $(item)Turtle Scute$() and a $(item)Prismarine Shard$() over two sand. A glass tank of turtles, axolotls and fish.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Turtles hatch on warm $(bold)beaches$() and shed scutes; prismarine is an $(item)Ocean Monument$() spoil.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

A glass-walled tank, lit by sea lanterns, full of life: $(bold)turtles$(), $(bold)axolotls$(), $(bold)tropical fish$() and a $(bold)squid$(), over a coral-and-sand floor. As much a display as a farm — but scutes and ink sacs are real rewards.

$(bold)A collector's island$()$(br)Made from a $(item)Turtle Scute$(), a $(item)Prismarine Shard$() and sand. Axolotls scoop into buckets, turtles lay scutes on sand, and the whole thing just looks lovely lit up at night.
